Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 238 

SECT_1115A_DEMO_IND 

LABEL: 1115(A) Demonstration Participation Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates that the claim or encounter was covered under the authority of an 1115(A) demonstration. 
1115(A) is a Center for Medicare and Medicaid Innovation (CMMI) demonstration. 

SHORT NAME: SECT_1115A_DEMO_IND 

LONG NAME: SECT_1115A_DEMO_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS
